name: GROOVE BOTANICALS INC.
business: Groove Botanicals Inc. is an early-stage company that intends to identify and evaluate early-stage intellectual property and applied technologies from Norwegian research institutions for potential licensing, development, or commercialization in North America. The company currently has no products, no revenue, and no contractual agreements with any institutions. It has one employee and has not yet identified any specific technology or intellectual property.

exposures.sentence: We believe certain Norwegian institutions are active in selected applied-technology sectors that may be relevant to North American markets, which may include energy and offshore technology, maritime and ocean industries, aquaculture, carbon capture, health sciences, medical technology, and other applied industrial and digital technologies.
